sources.name: AHDB RB209 Nutrient Management Guide
sources.completeness_note: Covers arable, grassland, vegetables, fruit, forage. Missing: some specialist horticultural crops.

sources.name: DEFRA Agricultural Price Indices
sources.completeness_note: Major arable and livestock feed prices. Missing: some specialist vegetable and fruit prices.

sources.name: AHDB Market Data
sources.completeness_note: Cereals and oilseeds ex-farm and delivered prices.

gaps: Northern Ireland CAFRE guidance not included
Micronutrients (Mg, Mn, Cu, Zn, B) not yet modeled
Lime recommendations (RB209 appendix) not yet included
Real-time price feeds not connected — prices are snapshots
